_schema: LxveOS board+display+input capability manifest. THE SSOT: scripts/gen_board_configs.py turns each row into boards/<id>/sdkconfig.defaults + board_info.h + CMakePresets entries, and Cyber Controller reads it for detect->variant->flash. Honesty rule: unknown pins/IDs/offsets stay null, NEVER invented. provenance = verified-on-hw | datasheet-community. This repo copy holds the M0 Tier-1 boards; more boards are reconciled to this schema incrementally.

bare_esp32_headless._note: Baseline serial/CLI + Cyber-Controller-bridge node. No display -> headless build.

pins._note: Display SPI on HSPI/SPI2. Community-sourced + adversarially verified (witnessmenow ESP32-Cheap-Yellow-Display User_Setup.h, rzeldent sunton board JSON, Random Nerd Tutorials, espboards.dev): unanimous across 4 refs, skeptic CONFIRMED, no 1-USB/2-USB divergence (pinouts identical, only the driver IC differs). rst=-1 tied to EN. Backlight GPIO21 active-HIGH (distinct from the RGB LED on 4/16/17). UNVERIFIED on this unit's hardware. Touch XPT2046 is a SEPARATE bus: sclk25/mosi32/miso39/cs33/irq36.

input._note: resistive XPT2046 on a SEPARATE SPI bus from the display (community-sourced + adversarially verified, same refs as display.pins _note): sclk25/mosi32/miso39/cs33/irq36. UNVERIFIED on this unit's hardware.

cyd_2432S028_classic._note: FLAGSHIP: 1-USB=ILI9341 vs 2-USB=ST7789 are electrically identical -> BOTH panel drivers compiled in; boot probe (0xD3->0x9341/0x7796, ST7789 heuristic) resolves it and caches to NVS.

pins._note: ST7796 320x480 BGR on SPI2. Community-sourced (rzeldent sunton esp32-3248S035R.json) + corroborated by CC display-type correction 538665c. Backlight GPIO27 active-HIGH. UNVERIFIED on hardware. The XPT2046 touch SHARES this SPI2 bus (only cs33/irq36 are its own), unlike the 2.8-inch which uses a separate VSPI.

input._note: Resistive XPT2046 sharing the DISPLAY SPI2 bus (sclk14/mosi13/miso12), own cs33/irq36. Community-sourced (rzeldent sunton esp32-3248S035R.json). UNVERIFIED on hardware. BSP attaches touch to the already-initialised display host (shares_display_bus), not a 2nd bus init.

cyd_3248S035_r._note: CYD 3.5-inch resistive (ESP32-3248S035R / -2432S035R). ST7796 320x480, no PSRAM, 4MB. Touch shares the display SPI2 bus. The C (GT911 capacitive) variant is a future sibling (I2C touch, needs esp_lcd_touch_gt911).

quirks: gpio_power_hold: firmware MUST hold the power-latch GPIO high or the unit powers off (no AXP192 PMIC)

input._note: 3-to-8 decoder GPIO scan (verified). ADV variant uses TCA8418 I2C -> separate board id.

quirks: no_psram: S3 FN8 has NO PSRAM despite some spec tables -> tight heap, lite UI, careful capture buffers
m5cardputer_v1._note: Keyboard deck on a NO-PSRAM S3 -> proves the tight-heap path.

input._note: in-cell touch shares the AXS15231B (single chip, verified); addr/init datasheet-community

jc3248w535_s3_qspi._note: S3 QSPI (AXS15231B) -> proves the QSPI + in-cell-touch path. Resolution inferred; validate init/pins on bench.
